node.content-desc: For video editing, definitely go with the M4 Pro.. It is significantly more powerful than the ... More Top answer · 5 votes
If sold and dispatched by Amazon, it's safe. If it's some other seller on Amazon it can be fishy. More 3 votes
Specs and price aside, make a video when you are receiving it and also opening it in one continuous ... More 1 vote
Don’t buy anything expensive from Amazon ever More 1 vote
If you’re worried go with a retailer that price matches (Best Buy?) and pick up at the store. More 1 vote
I'd add little more and go for Studio M4 Max for video editing. More 1 vote
If your family is coming after black friday there will be a probably black friday deals ... More 1 vote

node.content-desc: Apple 16 inch MacBook Pro (M4 Pro) Unboxing & Review YouTubeJoshua Dake Nov 8, 2025

node.text: Apple 16 inch MacBook Pro (M4 Pro) Unboxing & Review
Apple 16 inch MacBook Pro (M4 Pro) Unboxing & Review by Joshua Dake on YouTube. Play on Google. 11:00. Start time is 10 minutes, 4 seconds. Segment duration is 40 seconds
From 10 minutes, 4 seconds.The 16-inch M4 Pro MacBook Pro typically costs $2499, but Joshua Dake found it for $2189 on Amazon and got Best Buy to price match.

From 13 minutes, 23 seconds.$500-$600 MacBook Pro extra features include 120Hz ProMotion, better speakers, more ports, larger base SSD, and active cooling.
